text:
A long time ago there was a little mouse who lived in a big, bustling forest. Every morning the sun would poke through the trees and shine down on the forest floor. The little mouse would sit by the edge of a pond in the heart of this beautiful forest where he would catch small fish that moved gracefully.

One day, the little mouse felt lonely. He missed his friends who lived farther away in other parts of the forest. He imagined them all together talking about the forest animals they had seen lately.

After a long nap, the little mouse woke up with an idea. He decided he'd like to explore the forest once more. He picked up his tiny, fluffy ball for company.

He found a fallen log that seemed bigger than he was. He climbed eagerly up until he looked down at his tiny mouse-sized world. The log had holes like a secret clubhouse.

He climbed through a hole straight into a cozy tree hollow. It smelled like a mouse kitchen—a favorite spot during quiet evenings chatting
